locale_picker.label: Reo
locale_picker.region.middle-east-africa: Te Pā ki Te Rāwhiti me Āwherika
locale_picker.contribute: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo
home.hero.headline_a: Ka taea e koe te matapae i te Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao katoa?
home.hero.headline_b: E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu Whutuporo, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore he pukapuka tika i tutuki.
home.hero.lede: Kāhore tētahi i tutuki, ā, nā te nui rawa o ngā {odds_link}, kāhore pea e tutuki ake. E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu Whutuporo, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore anō kia kitea he pukapuka tino tika. Ko ngā kēmu 104 o 2026 te whakamātau hou. Ka pupuri a Tournamental i te pukapuka taupū o te ao, ka tuhia ia matapae ki te poraka mua i te whakaaranga o ia kēmu, nō reira kāhore e taea te whakarerekē, ā, ka taea anō te whakamana i te kōrero kororia.
home.hero.lede_link: ngā āheinga ki te tika i ngā kēmu 104 katoa
countdown.title_default: Mēhiko vs Āwherika ki te Tonga, 11 o Pipiri 2026
join.modal.title: Hono atu ki {pool_name}
join.modal.body: Tīpakohia he ingoa whakaatu me he tohu mō te pae arataki, ka tukua atu e mātou he waehere takitahi mā WhatsApp, mā īmēra rānei.
join.modal.field_handle: Tohu (ka kitea i te pae arataki)
join.modal.field_phone: Nama waea pūkoro (mō te takiuru WhatsApp)
join.modal.field_email_help: Ki te kore koe e whakamahi i a WhatsApp, tukuna mai tō wāhitau īmēra ki te whiwhi waehere takitahi. Kōwhiritia tētahi, tētahi atu rānei, ngā mea e rua rānei, ka tukuna te waehere ki ngā ara katoa ka tukuna mai e koe.
join.modal.footnote: Mā te hono atu, ka whakaae koe ki ā mātou tikanga. Ka whakamahia ō kōrero whakapā mō te takiuru anake, kāhore he hokohoko, kāhore he hunga tuatoru.
join.success.body_active: Nau mai ki {pool_name}. E uta ana i tō pukapuka…
join.success.body_pending: Kua tukuna tō tono ki te uru ki {pool_name} ki te kaiwhakahaere o te puna. Ka pānui atu mātou ki a koe ina whakaaengia.
join.error.phone_registered_strong: Kua rēhita kē taua nama waea.
join.error.phone_registered_body: Mēnā nōu, takiuru ki roto i WhatsApp, ka whiwhi koe i te waehere takitahi me te hononga takiuru pātō-tahi, kātahi ka tāpiri aunoa atu mātou i a koe ki {pool_name}.
odds.title: Kāhore tētahi e tika i ngā kēmu Ipu Whutuporo 104 katoa. Mō ake tonu atu.
odds.lede: Ka patua koe e te whakahonohono o ngā tūponotanga, ka whakatakotoria he papa e ngā kēmu tāwhirowhiro-rānei-tautauwhā e kore e taea e te mōhiotanga te wāwāhi, ka pakaru pāngarau ngā kēmu rakatia-katoa-i-te-tīmatanga i mua i te whīra tuatahi. Anei ngā tatauranga.
stage.r32: Te Tekau mā Ono Whiringa Toa
syndicate.members: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he mema} one {# mema} other {# ngā mema}}
syndicate.picks_made: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he matapae} one {# matapae kua tukua} other {# ngā matapae kua tukua}}
syndicate.join_footnote: Utu kore, taea te whakarerekē i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
footer.fifa_disclaimer: He motuhake a Tournamental, kāhore e hono ana, kāhore e tautokona ana, kāhore e whakaaetia ana e FIFA, e te Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao FIFA, e tētahi o ō rātou kaitautoko hoki. He tohu hokohoko rēhita a FIFA World Cup 2026™ nō te Fédération Internationale de Football Association.
footer.open_source: Pūtake mātāhuri ki raro i te Apache 2.0
footer.contribute_translation: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo: {link}
languages.hero.headline: Tournamental, i tō reo
languages.hero.intro1: Kei te mahi tahi mātou ki ngā kaikōrero matatini ki te whakarewa i a Tournamental ki ngā reo 22 hei te whakaaranga. Ka āwhinatia te tukunga tuatahi e te mīhini; ko ngā tono kume nā ngā kaikōrero matatini ka tino pai ai ia whakareo.
languages.hero.intro2: Pātōngia he reo i raro nei hei whakawhiti. Ka mahara mātou ki tō kōwhiringa mō te kotahi tau ki tēnei pūrere.
languages.contribute_link: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo
